opinion.h: McLAIN v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 129, Misc. Decided October 9, 1961.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
368 U.S. 10 LONGORIA v. DELAWARE. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF DELAWARE. No. 219, Misc. Decided October 9, 1961.
Clement C. Wood, Chief Deputy Attorney General of Delaware, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
